data.title: Mr. Clean returns from retirement to launch innovative product lineup, claims "there's a lot of magic" in it.
data.description: In Cincinnati today, Mr. Clean makes a comeback from retirement with a burst of inspiration and energy to introduce the biggest innovation in his renowned career. Dave Landers, Vice President of North America Surface Care at Procter & Gamble, expressed excitement for Mr. Clean's return, highlighting the magic in the new product lineup. The legendary figure is set to unveil the latest innovation, indicating that his legacy is far from over. This comeback marks a significant event with high expectations surrounding the partnership.

data.title: BCEN celebrates 20 years of ground transport nursing specialty certification, ensuring expert critical care by board-certified RNs.
data.description: In OAK BROOK, Ill., on March 4, 2026, the Board of Certification for Emergency Nursing (BCEN) is commending board-certified ground transport Registered Nurses (RNs) for their exceptional critical care expertise. These RNs provide top-tier care every second and every mile. BCEN is a leading authority for nursing specialty certification, setting the standard for quality in the industry. This recognition showcases the dedication and proficiency of these RNs who are essential in delivering crucial care during emergencies.

data.title: Peter Quintanilla appointed to beautify U.S. transportation infrastructure, advising on aesthetics including highways and bridges.
data.description: A prominent industry expert has been appointed to provide counsel to the U.S. Transportation Secretary on improving the visual appeal of the country's transportation infrastructure, such as highways, bridges, and transit centers. The decision was made in Pittsburgh on March 4, 2026. Michael Baker International, a renowned engineering company with a global presence, will be offering its expertise in this endeavor. This initiative aims to elevate the aesthetic standards of transportation systems nationwide.
Putin meets Hungary FM in the Kremlin

data.title: Illumia reveals new brand at Momentum ’26, announces 2026 Distinction Award winners in higher ed & healthcare.
data.description: Illumia, a company based in Scottsdale, Arizona, recently revealed its updated brand identity during Momentum '26. As part of this event, the company also recognized the winners of the 2026 Distinction Awards in the fields of higher education and healthcare. This unveiling event attracted attention due to its focus on customer experience and innovation in the industry.
US posts extension of national emergency on Iran.

data.title: Odditt launches free Bracket Party tool for casual fans to fill out March Madness brackets; 56M Americans expected to participate.
data.description: In Las Vegas on March 4, 2026, PRNewswire reported that approximately 56 million individuals in the United States are expected to participate in March Madness bracket pools this year. To cater to the vast majority who may not closely follow college basketball, sports data company Odditt has launched a free tool known as Bracket Party. This tool is designed to help users create NCAA tournament brackets even if they do not have in-depth knowledge of the sport.
BoC's Gov. Macklem: There has been no market dysfunction in the immediate wake of attacks on Iran.

data.title: Study shows Flo Health's Symptom Checker could cut endometriosis diagnosis time by over 50% from 7 to 3 years.
data.description: In New York, Flo Health, the top women's health app globally, revealed a significant peer-reviewed study showing that their Symptom Checker could lessen the time for an endometriosis diagnosis from about seven years to around three years. This marks a reduction of over 50%. Published in npj Digital Medicine under the esteemed Nature Portfolio, this study is the premier economic assessment of a digital symptom checker for endometriosis.

data.title: Arrive plans to acquire Passport to enhance urban mobility with self-driving tech. ATLANTA, March 4, 2026.
data.description: Arrive is progressing towards enhancing its urban mobility platform through an upcoming acquisition, with the aim of integrating self-driving technologies. This move underlines Arrive's dedication to improving city living conditions. The announcement was made in Atlanta on March 4, 2026.

data.title: Robots & Pencils appoints Jason Lacy as Client Partner for Education, with 30 years of experience in digital transformation.
data.description: An experienced executive with 30 years of experience in the industry is set to lead Robots & Pencils, a notable applied AI engineering partner based in Cleveland. The veteran executive has a proven track record of guiding various institutions, edtech platforms, publishers, and workforce organizations through digital transformation and modernization using applied AI. The announcement was made on March 4, 2026, showcasing the company's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological advancements.

data.title: Viking Holdings (NYSE: VIK) exceeds Q4 expectations. Earnings: 67 cents per share, Sales: $1.724 billion. Positive forecasts. CEO pleased with financial results.
data.description: Viking Holdings Ltd (NYSE: VIK) outperformed expectations in the fourth quarter, reporting earnings of 67 cents per share compared to the analyst consensus of 54 cents per share. The company also posted quarterly sales of $1.724 billion, surpassing the expected $1.624 billion. In 2025, Viking saw substantial growth in Adjusted Gross Margin by 22.6% and a 43.9% increase in Adjusted Net Income to $1,165.1 million year-over-year. Viking's Chairman and CEO, Torstein Hagen, highlighted the company's strong execution and momentum, citing an ROIC of 45.8% and Net Leverage of 1.1x as supporting factors.
